title: Standardize Page and Slide-Out Header Typography
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want all page and panel headers to use consistent sizing and styling, so that the visual hierarchy is predictable across the application.
description:
Standardize header typography across page titles and slide-out panel headers.

## Changes
- Change all header titles from H4 to H5 for a slightly smaller, balanced appearance
- Remove any inline CSS from title elements
- Update `.card-title` CSS: `margin: 3px 0px !important; min-height: 55px;`
- Create new `infotooltip` CSS class for info icons with tooltip initialization
- Add Bootstrap tooltip initialization script at the bottom of all pages
acceptance_criteria: All page and panel headers use H5 instead of H4
No inline CSS on title elements
card-title class has correct margin and min-height
Info tooltip class provides consistent icon styling
Tooltips are initialized and functional on all pages
ux_changes: All headers standardized to H5 with consistent card-title styling. New infotooltip class added for info icons. Bootstrap tooltip initialization added globally.
implementation_notes: Developer noted that the Argon template already includes tooltip initialization. H5 had extra default margin that was corrected via the card-title class override.
comment_summary: Developer changed H4 to H5, updated card-title CSS, and noted that tooltip initialization was already provided by the Argon template.
